description_long: This object is a multi-functional utensil combining a spoon and a knife, reminiscent of a Swiss Army-style tool. The handle is metallic and elongated, with a spoon bowl on one end and a straight-edged knife blade on the opposite end. A small, central lever or fold-out tool is visible along the side, suggesting additional utility. The entire object is made of a shiny, metallic material, likely stainless steel, with a smooth, reflective finish. The spoon bowl is oval and shallow, while the knife blade is slim and tapers to a point. The construction appears robust and compact, suitable for portable use.
description: A metallic multi-tool utensil featuring a spoon on one end and a knife blade on the other, with a central fold-out lever and a sleek, reflective finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the utensil, with the spoon bowl on the right and the knife blade on the left, as well as the central fold-out lever.
description_view_1: End-on view highlighting the oval shape of the spoon bowl and the thin profile of the knife blade, with the handle and lever visible in profile.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the full length of the utensil, with the spoon bowl on the left and the knife blade on the right, and the central lever visible.
description_view_3: End-on view from the knife blade side, showing the pointed blade and the spoon bowl's profile, with the handle and lever in silhouette.
attribute_orientation: spoon bowl facing right, knife blade facing left, handle horizontal
attribute_contextual_placement: resting flat on a surface or stored with other utensils
attribute_proximity_to_other_objects: often placed next to forks, knives, and other multi-tools
